since_last: 41% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.58%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 41% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.15% · BTC -1.30% · Gold +2.10% · Nasdaq100 -0.39%. 41% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.58%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.58%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.27%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +23.31%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +23.31%, DELL +10.93%, HPE +5.83%, NRG +4.48%, OKLO +4.18%. Laggards: PATH -9.51%, GEV -6.73%, WDAY -4.85%, NOW -4.36%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.72% at $122.64
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.72% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
